description.content: Remove objects from an image by masking the area to erase and letting the AI fill in the background naturally.

item.name: Erase an object from an image

request.name: Erase an object from an image

description.content: Removes an object or region from an image by providing a mask over the area to erase. The AI fills in the erased area with contextually appropriate background content that blends naturally with the surrounding image.

formdata.description: (Required) The source image containing the object to erase.
A mask image indicating the region to erase. White pixels indicate areas to remove, black pixels indicate areas to preserve.
A value to control randomness in generation.
The output format of the edited image. (This can only be one of jpeg,png,webp)

response.name: Successfully erased object from image

Fill in masked regions of an image using AI-guided inpainting with text prompts to control what appears in the filled area.

item.name: Inpaint a masked region of an image

request.name: Inpaint a masked region of an image

description.content: Fills in a masked region of an input image using AI-guided inpainting. Provide a source image, a mask indicating the region to fill, and a text prompt describing what should appear in the filled area. The result seamlessly blends with the surrounding image content.

formdata.description: (Required) The source image to inpaint. Must be a valid image file.
(Required) Text describing what should appear in the masked region.
A mask image indicating the region to inpaint. White pixels indicate areas to fill, black pixels indicate areas to preserve.
Text describing elements to exclude from the inpainted region.
A value to control randomness in generation.
The output format of the edited image. (This can only be one of jpeg,png,webp)

response.name: Successfully inpainted image

Extend the boundaries of an image by generating new content that seamlessly continues the existing scene in any direction.

item.name: Extend an image beyond its boundaries

request.name: Extend an image beyond its boundaries

description.content: Extends an image by generating new content beyond its current boundaries. Specify the number of pixels to extend in each direction and optionally provide a text prompt to guide the content of the extended regions. The generated content seamlessly continues the existing scene.

formdata.description: (Required) The source image to extend.
Optional text describing what should appear in the extended regions.
Number of pixels to extend to the left.
Number of pixels to extend to the right.
Number of pixels to extend upward.
Number of pixels to extend downward.
A value to control randomness in generation.
The output format of the edited image. (This can only be one of jpeg,png,webp)

Automatically detect and remove the background from an image, isolating the foreground subject.
Automatically detects and removes the background from an image, isolating the foreground subject. Returns the image with a transparent background in PNG format or a white background in JPEG format.

formdata.description: (Required) The source image from which to remove the background.
The output format of the image. PNG supports transparency for background removal. (This can only be one of png,webp)

Replace the background of an image and adjust lighting conditions using AI-powered scene understanding.

Replaces the background of an image with new content described by a text prompt and adjusts lighting conditions to match the new scene. The foreground subject is preserved while the background is regenerated.

formdata.description: (Required) The source image whose background will be replaced.
Text describing the new background scene and lighting conditions.
Text describing any adjustments to the foreground subject.
Text describing elements to exclude from the result.
A value to control randomness in generation.
The output format of the edited image. (This can only be one of jpeg,png,webp)

Find specific objects within an image and recolor them using text descriptions of the target object and desired color.

request.name: Search and recolor objects in an image

(Required) Text describing the desired color or appearance change.
(Required) Text describing the objects to find and recolor in the image.

info.name: Stability AI Stable Image Edit API

description.content:
The Stability AI Stable Image Edit API provides image editing capabilities including inpainting, outpainting, object erasing, background removal, and search-and-replace functionality. Developers can use natural language prompts to modify existing images, fill in masked regions, extend image boundaries, or replace specific objects within a scene. These tools enable advanced image manipulation workflows without requiring traditional image editing expertise.

Contact Support:
 Name: Stability AI Support
